messages.content:
**Commands:**
- `/topic <topic>` — Set thesis topic
- `/area <area>` — Set research area
- `/method <method>` — Set methodology
- `/outline` — Generate a full thesis outline
- `/write <chapter>` — Draft a chapter (e.g. `/write Literature Review`)
- `/memory` — View stored context
- `/reset` — Clear conversation (memory persists)
- `/help` — Show this help

**Other features:**
- **Upload PDF** — Click 📎 to upload and analyze a research paper
- **Export** — Click ⬇ on any AI response to download as Word, LaTeX, or Markdown
- **Drafts auto-save** — Chapter drafts from `/write` are saved to the `drafts/` folder
